title: smilax arisanensis
intro: Smilax arisanensis, a type of perennial vine in the Smilacaceae family, is a plant native to Taiwan and is commonly known as the Formosan cat's claw. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Smilax arisanensis include its potential to aid in the treatment of various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. In traditional herbal preparations, the roots and stems of the plant are often dried and used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
